title: SCAN multi-type expansion: UX, performance, architecture, design-fidelity scanners
description: Current SCAN only discovers test coverage gaps. Expand to 5 scan strategies: (1) coverage (existing), (2) design-fidelity: compare spec AC with actual implementation behavior, (3) ux-review: Playwright walks core user workflows evaluating usability against dashboard-design-system.md, (4) performance: API response times and casework timing vs baselines, (5) architecture: CLAUDE.md compliance, code anti-patterns, dependency analysis. Create scan-strategies.yaml for runner to select strategies per round. Each scanner outputs gaps that feed into existing GENERATE→TEST→FIX→VERIFY pipeline.
